title: Explorasive
description: Explorasive is a modpack made to make exploring your world more interesting and massive!
body:
![Explorasive Logo Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b6606402b819f45bc49935bc4147b3c04ba8397.png)
----

Explorasive is a Fabric modpack which adds and expands onto the exploration aspect of Minecraft!

It seeks to be an immersive, performant and dynamic experience!

![Nighttime Moonrise](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a63ce49b3638e71ab5c0fd6e8a3d1c34eb471ffc.png)

## Features
- Built in resource packs and shaders
- Dynamic Lighting
- Good Performance
- More structures via Dungeons and Taverns 
- World generation via Tectonic
